metadata.title: エサイの根より
metadata.subtitle: Es ist ein Ros entsprungen — Japanese, tr. Nakayama Masaki
metadata.composer: Michael Praetorius (1571–1621), harmonization from Musae Sioniae (1609)
metadata.lyricist: Anonymous 15th-century German hymn — Japanese translation by Nakayama Masaki 中山昌樹 (1886–1944)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Original German lyrics are a 15th-century anonymous hymn; Praetorius's harmonization (d. 1621) is PD by > 400 years. Japanese translation by Nakayama Masaki (d. 1944) — > 70 years post-mortem, PD per Japanese copyright law. Translation appeared in 讃美歌 96 番 「エサイの根より」
